decisions.decision: Multi-page structure was already complete from prior GSD phases — no re-splitting needed
Cart via localStorage + Alpine.store (guest-only, no Supabase for now)
decisions.rationale: Assessment scope; simpler; works without auth

decisions.decision: AI proxy via netlify/functions/ai-advisor.js — switched from Anthropic to NVIDIA NIM
decisions.rationale: User requested NVIDIA API key with MiniMax-M1 model; NVIDIA NIM is OpenAI-compatible; proxy returns normalized { reply } to frontend

decisions.decision: style-match.html — replaced placeholder with full AI chat page
decisions.rationale: User link to /style-match.html existed; needed full implementation; uses /api/ai-advisor not direct API call

decisions.decision: elvora_updated-3.html is superseded — real app is the separate HTML files
decisions.rationale: File was prior prototype; new architecture is the canonical source

next_action: HUMAN: Fill js/__env.js with Supabase credentials. Run schema + seed SQL. Add NVIDIA_API_KEY to Netlify env. Then: Task 10 (contact.html Supabase insert) and Task 11 (add cart.js to all pages).
context_notes: AI advisor function switched from Anthropic claude-haiku to NVIDIA NIM minimax/minimax-m1 (user request). Function normalizes response to { reply } — frontend reads data.reply. style-match.html implemented as full AI chat page. Remaining blocking tasks are all credential/deployment steps.
